name: Creole Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut steak into 7 equal serving pieces.
2. Mix flour, salt, paprika, and pepper in a shallow dish.
3. Dredge meat in the seasoned flour mixture.
4. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
5. Lightly brown onions and green peppers in the oil for about 5 minutes.
6. Remove onions and peppers from the oil with a slotted spoon.
7. Brown meat in the remaining oil until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Add onions and peppers back to the pan.
9. Cut tomatoes into quarters and add them along with their juice.
10. Sprinkle rice into the pan; stir to combine.
11. Add broth and water, stirring to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
12. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover tightly, and simmer for 1 1/2 hours or until meat is tender. Stir occasionally during cooking.
This recipe yields approximately 4 servings with a total calorie count of 409 per serving, containing 21 grams of carbohydrates, 30 grams of protein, and 22 grams of fat. Each serving also equates to 4 Medium-Fat Meat Exchanges plus 1 Bread Exchange plus 1 Vegetable Exchange.
